hero.badge: Smart DBT Solution for Social Justice
hero.description: Revolutionary Direct Benefit Transfer system for PCR & PoA Acts. Ensuring swift, transparent, and dignified assistance to victims of caste-based discrimination.

stats.impactSubtitle: Real-time statistics showcasing transparency and efficiency.

process.title: From Application to
process.description: Six streamlined steps ensuring a seamless, transparent, and rapid benefit delivery process.

steps.title: Register & Verify
steps.description: Victim registers on portal with Aadhaar-based verification

steps.title: File FIR & Upload
steps.description: Auto-fetch FIR from CCTNS or manual upload with documents

steps.title: Smart Assessment
steps.description: AI-powered validation and automatic eligibility check

steps.title: Direct Transfer
steps.description: Instant DBT to verified bank account via the PFMS

steps.title: Track & Feedback
steps.description: Real-time tracking and grievance redressal mechanism

benefits.title: Why Choose
benefits.description: Delivering measurable, meaningful impact with cutting-edge precision.

integrations.title: Works Seamlessly With
integrations.description: Connect to national and regional services with secure, auditable links — out of the box.
integrations.ctaDescription: Need a custom connector? We offer secure APIs, webhooks and enterprise onboarding.

faq.title: Got Questions?
faq.description: Common queries about the program, security, and integrations — explained simply.

items.question: How long does verification take?
items.answer: Most cases complete within 48-72 hours after documents are uploaded and Aadhaar verification is successful.

items.question: Is my data secure?
items.answer: Yes. We use bank-grade encryption, role-based access controls, and audit trails to ensure privacy and integrity.

items.question: Which documents are required?
items.answer: Aadhaar or government ID, FIR (if applicable), bank account details for DBT, and supporting evidence.

items.question: Can districts integrate their own SMS gateway?
items.answer: Yes — we support multiple SMS gateway providers and can onboard a custom provider via our enterprise onboarding.

features.title: Powerful Features
features.subtitle: Everything You Need for Seamless DBT
features.description: A comprehensive system designed with precision and care — ensuring transparency, speed, and impact at every stage.

secureVerification.title: Secure Verification
secureVerification.description: Multi-layer authentication with Aadhaar integration ensuring only genuine beneficiaries receive assistance

realTimeTracking.title: Real-Time Tracking
realTimeTracking.description: Monitor every stage from application to disbursement with live updates and transparent status tracking

unifiedDatabase.title: Unified Database
unifiedDatabase.description: Seamless integration with eCourts, CCTNS, and national databases for comprehensive case management

privacyProtection.title: Privacy Protection
privacyProtection.description: Bank-grade encryption and data privacy measures protecting sensitive victim information

analyticsDashboard.title: Analytics Dashboard
analyticsDashboard.description: Comprehensive insights with real-time analytics for better decision-making and accountability

multiStakeholder.title: Multi-Stakeholder Access
multiStakeholder.description: Role-based access for victims, officials, and administrators with customized dashboards

footer.companyDesc: Empowering social justice through technology. Making Direct Benefit Transfer transparent, efficient, and accessible for all.
footer.developedBy: Developed under Ministry of Social Justice & Empowerment, Government of India
